title: How to Run a CMO GMP Audit
alt: Five stages of conducting a risk-based CMO GMP audit

items.label: Establish accountability
items.desc: Contract giver stays responsible under EU GMP Chapter 7

items.label: Risk-based scoping
items.desc: Size effort to product risk per ICH Q9 before the visit

items.label: Conduct on-site audit
items.desc: Follow the process and data; verify written equals done

items.label: Drive root-cause CAPA
items.desc: Demand dated fixes; track to verified closure

items.label: Lifecycle oversight
items.desc: Re-audit as a recurring control under ICH Q10
